title: Backeria stipularis
taxonomy: Backeria stipularis is classified within the family Apocynaceae. This family consists of over 5,000 species of plants, commonly known as the dogbane or oleander family. The genus Backeria is a part of the subfamily Rauvolfioideae. Further classification of Backeria stipularis would involve its order and family at the rank of Lamiales. Within the family Apocynaceae, it is also placed within the tribe Plumerieae.
